# Feature: History Item Removal

## 1. Feature Goal

**ID**: FEAT-006  
**Source Plan**: `.spec-lite/plan_pane_actions.md`

Add a per-item remove action in the History pane so users can delete individual history entries directly from the list without clearing everything.

This improves day-to-day usability by letting users prune noisy or sensitive entries quickly while keeping the rest of their request history intact.

---

## 2. Data Model (Granular)

`.spec-lite/data_model.md` does not exist. This feature extends existing history models and interfaces only.

### Entities & Attributes

- **`CollectionRequest`** (existing history item model)
  - `id` (string) - unique history request ID used as the delete target key.
  - `name` (string) - display name in History row.
  - `method` (string) - HTTP method badge in History row.
  - `url` (RequestUrl) - request URL used for display fallback.

- **`HistorySlice`** (existing Zustand slice, extended)
  - `history` (`CollectionRequest[]`) - list rendered in `HistoryPane`.
  - `removeHistoryItem(requestId)` (new) - removes one item by ID after adapter confirms persistence.
  - Existing loading/error fields remain unchanged: `isHistoryLoading`, `historyLoadError`.

- **`IStorageAdapter`** (existing core contract, extended)
  - `deleteHistoryItem(requestId: string): Promise<Result<void, string>>` (new) - removes one persisted history entry.

- **`HistoryService`** (existing shared service, extended)
  - `deleteByRequestId(requestId: string)` (new) - removes one matching persisted history file and preserves sequential ordering invariants.

### Relationships

- `HistorySlice.history` 1:N rendered rows in `HistoryPane`.
- One row remove action maps to one `CollectionRequest.id`, which is passed through:
  `HistoryPane` -> `IStorageAdapter.deleteHistoryItem` -> platform adapter implementation -> persisted storage service.
- Persisted history files in shared service remain sequential (`1.json..N.json`); deleting one item requires re-sequencing to preserve existing ordering assumptions.

### Indexes & Constraints

- Remove operations must target exact `requestId` values present in history state.
- Store mutation (`removeHistoryItem`) must happen only after adapter success (`Result.isOk === true`).
- If persistence deletion fails, the row must remain in UI and an error notification must be shown.

---

## 3. Files

List of files this feature is expected to create or modify:

- `packages/core/src/components/common/HistoryPane.tsx` - add per-item hover remove control and remove handler.
- `packages/core/src/hooks/store/createHistorySlice.tsx` - add `removeHistoryItem` action.
- `packages/core/src/types/adapters.ts` - add `deleteHistoryItem` to `IStorageAdapter`.
- `packages/core/src/test/components/common/HistoryPane.test.tsx` - new component tests for FEAT-006 remove behavior.
- `packages/core/src/test/mocks/mockAdapter.ts` - add mock implementation for `deleteHistoryItem`.
- `packages/core/src/test/hooks/store/createHistorySlice.test.ts` - new store-slice unit tests for `removeHistoryItem`.

- `packages/web/src/adapters/webAdapter.ts` - implement `deleteHistoryItem` in web storage adapter.
- `packages/web/src/test/adapters/webAdapter.test.ts` - add web adapter tests for single-item history delete.
- `packages/server/src/routes/history.ts` - add single-item delete endpoint (`DELETE /api/history/:requestId`).
- `packages/shared/src/services/HistoryService.ts` - add history single-item delete method with file re-sequencing.
- `packages/shared/src/test/services/HistoryService.test.ts` - add unit tests for single-item delete behavior.

- `packages/vscode/src/webview/adapters/vsCodeAdapter.ts` - add `deleteHistoryItem` request/response flow.
- `packages/vscode/src/handlers/MessageHandler.ts` - handle `deleteHistoryItem` messages and delegate to shared `historyService`.
- `packages/vscode/src/test/handlers/MessageHandler.test.ts` - add handler tests for `deleteHistoryItem` success/failure paths.

---

## 4. Dependencies

- Existing History pane rendering in `packages/core/src/components/common/HistoryPane.tsx`.
- Existing history load/save plumbing across adapters and services.
- Existing notification adapter usage pattern (`notification.showNotification('error', message)`) for adapter failures.
- Existing shared history file ordering behavior in `HistoryService`.

---

## 5. Implementation Tasks

> DEVIATION: Plan notes web persistence as local IndexedDB/localStorage filtering. In current codebase, web history persistence is server-backed (`/api/history` via axios in `packages/web/src/adapters/webAdapter.ts`). FEAT-006 should therefore add a server route + shared service path for single-item delete instead of localStorage filtering. Awaiting confirmation.

### TASK-001: Add core FEAT-006 interaction contract and state mutation path

- [x] **Implementation**: Extend `IStorageAdapter` with `deleteHistoryItem(requestId)`, add `removeHistoryItem(requestId)` to `createHistorySlice`, update `HistoryPane` to render a per-row hover remove control (`XIcon` or `Trash2Icon`, destructive styling) and invoke adapter deletion before store removal. Ensure remove-button click does not trigger row selection (`stopPropagation`) and preserve existing row click behavior.
- [x] **Unit Tests**: Add `HistoryPane.test.tsx` coverage for: remove control rendering, remove click calls adapter with correct ID, successful delete removes only target row, failed delete shows error and keeps row, remove click does not call `onRequestSelect`. Add `createHistorySlice.test.ts` coverage for `removeHistoryItem` filtering behavior and non-target retention.
- [x] **Documentation Update**: Add/refresh JSDoc and concise inline comments in `HistoryPane.tsx` and `createHistorySlice.tsx` explaining adapter-first removal ordering and event-propagation safeguards.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test -- HistoryPane createHistorySlice` and manually confirm hover remove appears on history rows and only deletes the clicked item.

### TASK-002: Implement FEAT-006 single-item delete for web/server/shared persistence

- [x] **Implementation**: Add `deleteByRequestId(requestId)` to `HistoryService` (shared), including file lookup by parsed request ID, delete, and deterministic re-sequencing. Add `DELETE /api/history/:requestId` route in server history routes that delegates to shared service and emits `emitStateChange('history')`. Implement `deleteHistoryItem(requestId)` in web adapter calling new endpoint and returning `Result<void, string>`.
- [x] **Unit Tests**: Extend `HistoryService.test.ts` with single-item delete cases (target found, target missing/idempotent behavior, ordering preserved after delete). Extend `webAdapter.test.ts` History block with adapter success and error cases for `deleteHistoryItem` endpoint call.
- [x] **Documentation Update**: Add method-level docs in `HistoryService.ts` and route comments in `history.ts` describing single-item delete semantics and ordering guarantees.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/shared test -- HistoryService` and `pnpm --filter @wave-client/web test -- webAdapter`; manually issue DELETE request against `/api/history/:requestId` and confirm only one item is removed.
- **Depends on**: TASK-001.

### TASK-003: Implement FEAT-006 single-item delete in VS Code webview-extension bridge

- [x] **Implementation**: Add `deleteHistoryItem` method in `vsCodeAdapter` using requestId-correlated response handling (`sendAndWait`), add `deleteHistoryItem` mapping in response data map (void), add `deleteHistoryItem` case + handler in `MessageHandler` delegating to shared `historyService` and posting success/error response messages.
- [x] **Unit Tests**: Extend `MessageHandler.test.ts` with `deleteHistoryItem` success/failure assertions (service called with requestId, correct response message posted). Add/adjust adapter tests if present for request/response mapping of the new method.
- [x] **Documentation Update**: Update adapter/handler inline comments describing requestId correlation and void response handling for history item delete.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter wave-client-vscode test -- MessageHandler` and manually validate deleting one history item in VS Code webview removes only that row after adapter success.
- **Depends on**: TASK-001.

---

## 6. Cross-Cutting Concerns

- **Auth**: N/A.
- **Error Handling**: All delete operations must follow `Result` pattern; UI removal occurs only on success. Failures surface user-facing notifications and do not mutate history state.
- **Logging**: Reuse existing service/route error logging. Include operation context (requestId, operation name) in logs without logging sensitive payload bodies.

---
